query: Can you plot a distribution chart comparing the number of cars and trucks in the image?

input.text:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

labels = ['Cars', 'Trucks']
counts = [8, 2]

plt.figure(figsize=(6,4))
plt.bar(labels, counts, color=['blue', 'green'])
plt.title('Distribution of Vehicles')
plt.ylabel('Count')
plt.grid(True, axis='y')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
